Steps:

 2. Enter valid email 
 3. Enter valid password 
 4. Click Submit
Expected Result: User is redirected to the dashboard

Steps:
1. Open login page 
 2. Enter valid email

1. Open login page \n 2. Attempt login with valid email \n 3. Account must be locked
1. Open registration page \n 2. Fill in all fields with valid data \n 3. Click Sign Up
Expected Result: System displays 'Registration successful' message and redirects to login

Steps:
1. Open registration page 
 2. Enter an email already in the system 
 3. Fill in other fields 
 4. Click Sign Up
Expected Result: System displays 'Email already exists' error message

Steps: 1. Open registration page \n 2. Enter non-matching passwords \n 3. Click Sign Up
Expected Result: System displays 'Passwords do not match' error message

Steps: 1. Open login page \n 2. Leave email and password empty \n 3. Click Submit
Expected Result: System prevents submission or shows validation errors on fields

Steps:
1. Open login page 
 2. Enter ' OR 1=1 -- in email field 
 3. Enter any password

Expected Result: System must not log in and should handle the input securely (e.g., 'Invalid credentials')

Steps: 1. Log in to system \n 2. Wait for session timeout period (or manually expire) \n 3. Click any protected link
